vllm.title: [Bugfix] Explicitly disable Phi-4-multimodal in V1
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since V1 is now used by default, we need to apply SupportsV0Only for Phi-4-multimodal so V0 is automatically selected when running the model.

vllm.title: [BugFix][V1] Fix overhead related to bad_words sampling when not in use
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Sampling metadata was being populated with a list of empty dicts for the whole batch which was iterated over during sampling. This showed up when profiling.

vllm.title: [V1][BugFix] Detect interleaved sliding window attention
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #14881
This PR fixes the bug that the model runner doesn't detect the use of sliding window when the model uses interleaved local and global attention.

vllm.title: [Misc] Catching Ray Compiled Graph PP test failures for V1
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The pipeline parallel tests are not raising when failed for Ray Compiled Graph in V0. However, in V1 we should actually make sure the tests pass and capture errors early. This PR therefore raises exception when the test fail.
We should still address the V0 flakiness. But that's less urgent than enfo

vllm.title: [Doc] Add guidance for using `ccache` with `pip install -e .` in doc
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #13697
ccache doesn't work when use with pip install -e .
Added hint to documentation:
When using ccache with pip install -e ., you should run CCACHE_NOHASHDIR="true" pip install --no-build-isolation -e .. This is because pip creates a new folder with a random name for each build, preventing cca

vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After syncing with @WoosukKwon, we change the scope of this PR,

We will support random sampling for spec decode in this PR.
Since only ngram is supported in vllm V1, we only support ngram random sampling for now. However, the random sampling should be general to other drafting methods.
The PR shoul

vllm.title: [V1] Remove input cache client
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: All multi-modal models that support V1 have been refactored to use the merged input processor, so we can remove the code path that corresponds to legacy input mapper.
